candidates.why: Primary revenue line representing total operating revenue; best match for top-line sales.
Cost line, not revenue; included only as candidate but not appropriate for REVT.
Residual cost component related to COGS, not revenue.
Explicitly a cost of goods sold label, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue/sales.
Interest income, not operating revenue/sales.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not a revenue flow.
Main operating cost of sales line; best representation of COGS.
Adjustment related to inventory, but not the primary COGS line; could be part of COGS but less direct than Cost of sales.
Residual COGS-related line but secondary to main Cost of sales line.
Component of production costs but more granular; prefer aggregate Cost of sales for COGS.
Additional COGS components but again secondary to main Cost of sales.
Likely part of operating costs but may include non-COGS items; less precise than Cost of sales.
Explicit COGS label but appears as an alternative formulation; secondary to the populated Cost of sales line.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, not direct COGS.

candidates.row_label: Other Salaries and Other Payroll Expenses
candidates.why: Likely SG&A or overhead, not strictly COGS.
Broad operating overhead bucket including SG&A; not pure COGS.
Selling expense within SG&A, not COGS.
R&D expense, not COGS.
Overhead/other operating costs; not core COGS line.
Other third-party costs; could span COGS and SG&A; ambiguous.
R&D expense, not COGS.
Overhead rental costs; part of SG&A/operating expenses, not COGS.
Other overhead-type expenses, not primary COGS line.
Net operating figure, not a specific COGS line.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Non-operating item, not COGS.
Supplemental disclosure of rental expense; not the main COGS line.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not P&L COGS.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid Expenses and Other Current Assets
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not COGS.
Balance sheet item, not current-period COGS.
Balance sheet item, not current-period COGS.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component; clearly part of overhead SG&A.
Alternative/related SG&A stock-based compensation label; also part of SG&A overhead.
Broad bucket of operating overhead expenses, excluding COGS and D&A; appropriate SG&A-type component.
Subcomponent of other operating expenses, likely SG&A overhead.
Additional other operating expenses; also SG&A-type overhead.
Represents operating income, not expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead expense components and excluded 'Other Operating Revenue' as it is income, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; primary choice for R&D expense.
Alternative wording for R&D expense; included as fallback label though appears unpopulated in preview.
Amortization of capitalized R&D, not the current-period R&D expense; should not be used as XRD.
Balance sheet capitalized R&D cost; not the expense flow.
Accumulated amortization on R&D assets; balance sheet, not current expense line.
Main interest expense line; best primary measure of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; component of total interest expense; good secondary label.
Net interest result; acceptable fallback if gross interest expense lines were missing.
Non-lease interest expense; complements lease interest; strong secondary option after main Interest Expense line.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Supplemental disclosure of interest expense; can serve as fallback if primary lines unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest disclosure; tertiary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Other Interest-bearing loans, leasing and borrowings
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet liability category, not expense.
Equity attributable to non-controlling shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as Non-Controlling Interests; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered choices so that gross Interest Expense is preferred, followed by non-lease and lease components, then net and supplemental disclosures as fallbacks.

candidates.row_label: Investments in associates accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Asset account for associates, not equity capital.

candidates.row_label: Share premium account and other equity deposits
candidates.why: Component of paid-in capital but not total book equity; subtotal-level, not the overall equity figure needed for BE.
Component of equity (likely retained earnings or similar), but not the full equity attributable to owners.

candidates.row_label: Other Paid in equity / Uncovered losses
candidates.why: Component of equity; not the aggregate equity measure.
Represents the total shareholders’ equity; best available proxy for book equity when no separate parent-only equity line exists.

variables.notes: Using 'Total equity' as the aggregate book equity measure because no separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' line is provided.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to NCI, not the balance sheet MIB stock; BE is mapped to Total equity, so to avoid double counting per instructions, MIB is set to 0 (no row selected).
Same as above: income allocation line, not equity stock; excluded to avoid double counting with Total equity BE choice.
Balance sheet NCI component of equity; would ordinarily be MIB, but since BE uses 'Total equity' per instructions, including this would double count MIB in the denominator.
Duplicate/alternative label for NCI; same reasoning as above regarding double counting with 'Total equity'.

variables.notes: Per the equity rule, since BE is mapped to 'Total equity', MIB is set to 0 (no separate MIB row selected) to avoid double counting non-controlling interests in the PROF denominator.
